description: Monitors Kubernetes cluster using Prometheus. Shows overall cluster CPU / Memory / Filesystem usage as well as individual pod, containers, systemd services statistics. Uses cAdvisor metrics only.

targets.expr:
# 노드별 루트 디스크 사용률 (%)
sum by (node_name) (
  label_replace(
    container_fs_usage_bytes{id="/", instance=~"$Node"}, 
    "node_name", "$1", "instance", "(.*)"
  )
) 
/ 
sum by (node_name) (
  label_replace(
    container_fs_limit_bytes{id="/", instance=~"$Node"}, 
    "node_name", "$1", "instance", "(.*)"
  )
) 
* 100

# 1순위: 삭제 시간(DeletionTimestamp)이 존재하면 무조건 숫자 2 (보라색/종료중)
(sum by (pod) (kube_pod_deletion_timestamp{namespace="lunch", pod=~"lunch-api-.*"} > 0) * 0 + 2)
OR
# 2순위: 삭제 시간이 없으면 현재의 Phase 상태를 숫자로 (정상은 1)
(sum by (pod) (kube_pod_status_phase{namespace="lunch", pod=~"lunch-api-.*", phase="Running"} == 1) * 0 + 1)

title: Kubernetes cluster monitoring (via Prometheus)
